title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Pride Flooring Derby Ltd
body: "Application number 5205  Applicant Pride Flooring Limited objected to the name used by Pride Flooring Derby Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 20 June 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Pride Flooring Derby Ltd is changed to 15583291, Ltd. "
